title: Infosys completes internal transfer of 90% shareholding in Infosys Consulting S.R.L., Argentina
detailed_summary: Infosys Limited completed the transfer of 90% of its shareholding in Infosys Consulting S.R.L., Argentina, a majority owned subsidiary, to Infosys Nova Holdings LLC, a wholly owned subsidiary of the Company, on January 28, 2026. No transaction value, financial impact, strategic rationale, or change in ultimate ownership control was disclosed.

key_facts.fact: Infosys Limited completed transfer of 90% of the shareholding held in Infosys Consulting S.R.L., Argentina to Infosys Nova Holdings LLC on January 28, 2026.
Infosys Consulting S.R.L., Argentina is described as a majority owned subsidiary, and Infosys Nova Holdings LLC is described as a wholly owned subsidiary of the Company.

corporate_actions.description: Infosys Limited completed transfer of 90% of the shareholding held in Infosys Consulting S.R.L., Argentina, a majority owned subsidiary, to Infosys Nova Holdings LLC, a wholly owned subsidiary of the Company.
